# toResponseBody()

> **Test Support Layer**

```ts
function toResponseBody(value: unknown): Record<string, unknown>;
```

Defined in: [src/app/testing/utility/reflect.utility.ts:107](https://github.com/EmperorRAG/first-mcp/blob/3d2831b148eaa4c84c57fa062fce6df920f72a50/src/app/testing/utility/reflect.utility.ts#L107)

Converts an `unknown` value to a plain `Record<string, unknown>`
via `Object.entries`.

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type      | Description           |
| --------- | --------- | --------------------- |
| `value`   | `unknown` | The value to convert. |

## Returns

[`Record`](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference)<`string`, `unknown`>

A plain key-value record, or `{}` if `value` is not a
non-null, non-array object.

## Remarks

Strips prototype-inherited properties by round-tripping through
[Object.entries](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference) and [Object.fromEntries](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference).  Returns an
empty record for primitives, `null`, and arrays, preventing
downstream code from operating on unexpected shapes.
